response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong software engineering skills and meets the minimum education/experience requirement (BS in Computer Science + 14+ years professional experience), there is a fundamental domain mismatch. The role requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and deep-learning workload optimization. The resume shows exclusively software-focused experience (web, backend, mobile, DevOps, and recently AI infrastructure tooling), with no evidence of hardware design, microarchitecture analysis, or accelerator optimization knowledge. This would require a complete career transition rather than leveraging existing expertise.
strengths: Meets minimum education requirement with 14+ years of professional software engineering experience
Demonstrates strong performance optimization background from high-throughput systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/sec)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure at Stripe shows openness to expanding into ML-adjacent areas
concerns: No experience with SoC design, IP core modeling, or hardware simulation and verification
AI/ML expertise limited to infrastructure tooling; no evidence of deep neural network workload optimization or GPU architecture knowledge
Entire career trajectory is software-focused with zero demonstrated hardware-software co-design experience

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
Missing GPU architecture and deep learning workload analysis expertise
